features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The shark can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The shark makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +9 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - Apex underwater predator with blood frenzy
tactical_info.positioning: Seeks wounded targets for advantage on attacks
tactical_info.damage_output: 44 piercing per round with two bite attacks
tactical_info.key_abilities: Advantage against wounded targets makes it devastating
tactical_info.synergies: Excels in aquatic encounters, particularly against injured foes
